p0Rules: Credits should not be consumed for failed parse before analysis.
Duplicate Stripe events should not award credits twice.
Duplicate analysis submissions should not double-charge.
Free credits should not be donatable if paid-only donation rule applies.
Displayed balance should match ledger-derived balance.
User credit actions must be scoped to the correct user.
recommendedApiAssertions: status code is safe and expected
balance is derived from ledger sum
